storage_extensions.usage: mmap codes.bin; use plabel_codes[pre_row] as integer group key component instead of varlen string lookup. Only decode plabel strings for the final 200 output rows using dict_offsets + dict_data.

join_order.notes: Bitset indexed by sub_fk for O(1) filter during num scan
Build hash map from IS-filtered pre rows keyed on (sub_fk, tag_code, version_code) → plabel_code (uint32_t from dict-encoded plabel). No string operations needed.

data_structures.sub_fk_to_name_id: direct_array(uint32_t, 86135) — maps sub_fk to deduplicated name_id
data_structures.pre_hash_map: compact_hash_multimap<(sub_fk:u32, tag_code:u32, version_code:u32) → plabel_code:u32>, bucket-chain layout, ~1.06M entries. Entry struct: {sub_fk, tag_code, version_code, plabel_code} all uint32_t. Use same hashKey3 function. Build from IS range of pre using dict-encoded plabel codes — NO string operations.
data_structures.aggregation: open_addressing_hash_map<GroupKey(name_id:u32, tag_code:u32, plabel_code:u32) → AggValue(sum:double, count:u64)>, thread-local with merge. Use open-addressing (linear probing) instead of std::unordered_map for better cache behavior. Reserve ~32K per thread.

parallelism.notes: Morsel size 100K rows over USD range. Thread-local open-addressing agg maps, merge after scan. Move tag_dict loading to output phase to overlap with parallel scan if possible.

indexes.purpose: Get contiguous USD row range in num
Get contiguous IS row range in pre

optimization_notes: Category E + A: The data_loading phase consumed 560ms (82% of total), dominated by 1.06M varlen plabel string constructions, hashings, and unordered_map insertions during pre hash map build. Root cause is a storage-level mismatch: varlen plabel strings force expensive per-row string operations. Built dict-encoded pre.plabel (698K unique values → uint32_t codes). The revised plan: (1) mmap plabel codes.bin and read integer codes for IS range rows instead of varlen string dedup — eliminates all string operations from pre hash map build, reducing it from ~500ms to ~20ms; (2) use open-addressing hash maps for thread-local aggregation instead of std::unordered_map for better cache locality; (3) defer tag_dict loading to output phase since it's only needed for decoding 200 result rows. Group key is all-integer: (name_id:u32, tag_code:u32, plabel_code:u32).
